overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage depicting a slow boat journey along an industrial canal beneath a massive suspension bridge at sunset. The scene features dystopian architecture with a prominent red warning sign, atmospheric orange lighting filtering through storm clouds, and reflective water surfaces.

events.description: flock of birds flies across the sky between the bridge cables

agents.ego_description: piloting a small boat forward along the canal, approaching and passing beneath the bridge structure

entered.detail: massive steel suspension bridge spanning the canal with intricate trusswork and a central emblem
tall concrete industrial structure with weathered textures rising from the water's edge
illuminated red sign with white text reading SEVERE mounted on the building facade
elevated metal catwalk or ramp structure with railings running along the right bank
rippling water with golden reflections of the sunset and bridge structure
hazy silhouette of urban buildings visible through the bridge in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward on water beneath a massive industrial suspension bridge during a golden sunset. To the left, a towering concrete building displays a prominent red 'SEVERE' warning sign, while a metal walkway lines the right bank. The water reflects the warm orange sky as birds fly overhead between the bridge cables.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady forward movement along an industrial waterway that transitions from the shadow of massive architecture into the glow of a golden sunset. It begins by gliding across reflective water beneath the imposing cables of a suspension bridge, where birds drift through the air above. As the camera advances, the view opens to reveal a towering concrete building on the left marked by a prominent red SEVERE warning sign. The scene then shifts focus toward the right bank, passing a long metal walkway while the warm orange light of the sky deepens across the water's surface.
